title: Nursery Rhyme. CXX. Scholastic.
content:
The rose is red, the grass is green;
        And in this book my name is seen.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXX. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
